timeline.title: First Meet
timeline.description: It was a chance encounter that would change our lives forever. Our eyes met across the room, and in that moment, we both knew something extraordinary was about to happen.

timeline.title: First Date
timeline.description: Our first official date was filled with laughter, deep conversations, and the undeniable feeling that we had found something special. That evening, we both knew this was the start of something beautiful.

timeline.title: First Kiss
timeline.description: Under the stars on a warm summer night, we shared our first kiss. It was magical and confirmed what we both felt in our hearts - this was real love.

timeline.title: Meeting the Families
timeline.description: We introduced each other to our families, and it was clear that everyone could see what we saw in each other. The love and acceptance we received made our bond even stronger.

timeline.title: First Vacation Together
timeline.description: We took our first trip together to the mountains. Spending a week in nature, just the two of us, deepened our connection and created memories we'll cherish forever.

timeline.title: Moving In Together
timeline.description: We took the big step of moving in together. Creating our first home together was exciting and made us realize we were building a future as a team.

timeline.title: The Proposal
timeline.description: On a beautiful spring day, Michael got down on one knee and asked the most important question of our lives. The answer was an immediate and joyful 'Yes!'

timeline.title: Wedding Planning
timeline.description: Planning our wedding together has been an amazing journey. Every decision we make together brings us closer and makes us more excited for our special day.
